Rows.IDAComment: summonId (this[146] = ctrl[0x248] = owner cid on v84) — CVecCtrlSummoned::EndUpdateActive@0xa0fddd

movement blob — CMovePath__Flush@0xa0fdec (opaque; head is Encode2 startX, Encode2 startY, Encode1 count, count moves, keypad run, bounding box). Atlas rebroadcasts the whole post-identity remainder byte-faithfully and extracts startX/startY from the first 4 bytes for position seeding.
